title: 100 Hand-drawn Fantasy Ink Illustrations
desc: Gritty, all-original illustrations exemplary of the OSR vibe that are definitely appropriate for Shadowdark. Includes high-resolution TIFF raster files and even vectorized versions.

title: A Very Merry Shadowe'en
desc: Beholden to squabbling hags, the Island of Hands hauls itself each equinox with multitudes of spindly limbs across the dark. Each hag masquerades as an innocent maiden. When the island's grasping phalanges pluck the party, placing them in a fog-choked wood at its crown, they must circumvent being remade by the crones' rituals.

title: Against the Dark 3: Legend of the Archfiend
desc: A free hexcrawl adventure featuring four elemental tombs, a wilderness region, and a climactic Dark Castle. A relic hunt against lethal traps and an archfiend.

title: Ancient Talismans: The Whisperer Class
desc: The free Whisperer class exudes versatility through ancient talismans, combining martial capability with mental influence.

title: Arcanist
desc: A class supplement presenting three flavors of arcane practitioner: the devout mage-priest, cultists acting in service to spirits, and channelers of primordial sorcery.

title: Ascension of the Serpent Queen
desc: To find a prince whose caravan had been ambushed on the way to a diplomatic summit, the party must venture forth into the den of a fanatical cabal and their serpent queen. Survival depends upon slipping past traps and lurking horrors with time to spare for preventing an unspeakable ritual. 1st-level characters must stop the queen from further empowering herself in this adventure that includes tokens and portrait art.

title: Brains and Brawn: The Library Knight Class
desc: A free class combining martial training with scholarly study. The Library Knight applies academic knowledge of monsters, dungeon hazards, and basic magic alongside solid combat capability.

title: Call of the Black Star
desc: "Simply crash the meteor within a short distance from your players' favorite town and let the orb do the rest!" A cosmic horror adventure set in the geometrically-intriguing Black Star Dungeon, filled with teamwork-based obstacles and the hazardous radiation of Eldritch Aether!

title: Carousing with the Gnome King's Jewels
desc: After twenty-five years of gossip, there is finally a lead on who stole the crown jewels from the gnome king. Where will the clue lead the party?

title: Caverns of Carnage
desc: Grimhaven and its subterranean tunnels have set the greedy in motion, yet the jungles are stalked by carving "cultists, cannibals, and a ravenous giant panther." Hooded zealots draped in feather-and-bone jewelry studded with gemstone chips (worth prying from a corpse) stand between 1st- to 3rd-level adventurers and far greater treasures.

title: Celtic Shadows
desc: A 162-page campaign sourcebook set in Mythic Ireland, covering levels 1–10. Includes distilled research on Celtic history and mythology, 15+ adventures, a bestiary, two new classes, and optional mechanics for severely injured characters.

title: Character Creation Guide
desc: A quick reference for creating 0th- and 1st-level characters that distills ancestries, classes, weapons, armor, alignments, deities, backgrounds, languages, spells, and gear on two pages.

title: Choice of Life
desc: Opportunity arises for 3rd- to 4th-level characters when the daughter of a werewolf family ferries them through a portal to the far side of the moon... but later betrays her own kin. The fleaborn are now intent on flushing the bloodline out from their peaceful existence in Hothers Valley. Features new monsters such as the "Worm that Walks," a new class, and magical gear.

title: City of Hawkmoor
desc: The urban-fantasy "City of Hawkmoor" provides the framework for and initial installment of the Hawkmoor campaign setting, detailing the 12-quarter city at the heart of the Great Enchanted Vale. Includes the details you need to know about the 8,000-person city, including history and politics, and the ten-level undercity lying underneath.

title: Cold Nights
desc: A supplement that makes the frozen north playable in full. Introduces the Wilder, a class that survives brutal terrain by forging connections with local spirits and beasts. Rounds out the setting with arctic-specific weapons, armor, travel mechanics, cold weather effects, terrain types, gear, and stat blocks for northern creatures and mounts.

title: Corruption at the Verdant Shrine
desc: A bearded devil torments scattered humanoid camps near the site of a shrine it had seized in the woods, hunting for a warded magic relic that it would claim as its own... should the party fail to intervene. For three to five 2nd- to 3rd-level characters, this mini-dungeon runs roughly 4-6 hours.

title: Creature Classes
desc: Eight playable creature ancestry classes: Catkin, Equizards, Mind Mice, Petty Dragons, Shimmercats, Spirit Foxes, Sternulfs, and Wink Dogs. Includes a creature-specific background table.

title: Cricket Creek Hollow
desc: Long ago The Wild Wood swallowed the Belirian Empire; the land is now a reclaimed wilderness of scattered ruins. The village of Cricket Creek Hollow is the last inhabited place in the region, hosting a lore-laden hexcrawl with four new monsters, a name generator, and a treasure tournament.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 1: Diablerie!
desc: The first Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: tread demon-stalked forests and collapsing castles. Adds three classes, 36 spells, six warlock patrons, 20 backgrounds, 14 monsters, and ready-to-run locations: the Hideous Halls of Mugdulblub and Gloaming hexcrawl.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 2: Red Sands
desc: The second Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: traverse the blistering desert of sandstorms and lurking assassin-sorcerers. Introduces three classes, 14 monsters, and rules for mounted combat, pit fighting, poisons, and lasting wounds. Plus, two new locations: the 4th–6th level dungeon Fortress of the Burning Brothers and the Djurum desert hexcrawl.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 3: Midnight Sun
desc: The third Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: brave a harsh Norse-inspired archipelago. Adds two classes, 12 monsters, and rules for boats, oaths, and arctic conditions. Introduces two new locations: the 0-level gauntlet Hoard of the Sea Wolf King and the drake-infested Isles of Andrik hexcrawl.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 4: River of Night
desc: The fourth Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: cross the river into the menacing Tal-Yool Jungle. Adds the Ranger and Basilisk Warrior classes, a complete Druid spell list, a hexcrawl, and nine mini-adventures.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 5: Dwellers in the Deep
desc: The fifth Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: explore Morzomotha, a grim region only for those who don't fear the Shadowdark. Adds the Delver and Wyrdling classes, a complete spell list for chaotic wizards, and the Goulish Library of Leng adventure.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 6: City of Masks
desc: The sixth Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: city-crawl through the perilous, fabled City of Masks. Adds the Bard and Duelist classes, spells for lawful wizards, and greatly expands carousing and downtime rules.

title: Dacian Draco
desc: Splicing wolves with dragons means a sojourn to the moon, where no torch nor magic will hold sway over the shadows. There are whispers that the Wolf Cult has returned in the accompanying 16-page A5 booklet, detailing a dungeon, compact adventuring area, and a new class called the Lone Wolf.

title: Demidirge: Fanged Funnel
desc: You are a tunneler who must conspire to escape the watchful and subterranean acid sea blistering underneath a liminal cathedral. Avoiding the awareness of a Queen and the wraith-priests is advised, while exploiting "contraband fossils" and decaying tools.

title: Detour to the City of Torment
desc: Welcome to Torment, a city betwixt life and death at the liminal periphery of Chronospace, its gnarled and knotted streets crossing dimensions, and their myriad sub-dimensional layers, to the most twisted eldritch beings in the Kosmos. Sheer bravery or madness is the only necessary qualification for those wishing to participate in this sandbox adventure.

title: Double Trouble: The Dancer Class
desc: A free class built around dual-wielding and evasion. The Dancer uses rapid movement and two-weapon techniques to outmaneuver opponents in close combat.

title: Drifter (Ranger) Class
desc: A wilds-focused class for those who like to play beast-attuned trackers, solitary survivalists, and dual-wielding skirmishers. Enables a Drizzt-inspired character concept without destabilizing the table.

title: Dungeon Death: 16-bit Rules
desc: A strange cartridge launches you into a world with 16-bit video game rules drawing inspiration from Jumanji, Tron, manga, and LitRPGs. Go back to the 90s by retaking The Crystal of Harmony from P'ork, and be reminded of how old you are.

title: Dusk till Dawnbarrow
desc: A single-page introductory gauntlet set in an ancient barrow of a strange order. Designed for quick preparation and play.

title: Enigma of the Eryx Estate
desc: 1st- to 3rd-level characters must solve a murder mystery of layered and experience-rewarding sub-mysteries by the hush of night. Otherwise, it might be the end of the party. A minimal-prep scenario set in a reclaimed roadside inn that once belonged to the Eryx family. Can the party help merchant Robert E. Wardlove save his distressed daughter?

title: Escaping Bansunin
desc: A 0th-level gauntlet set in lightless underground captivity. Characters are forced laborers in a subterranean camp and fed only what their captors deem expendable. Getting out alive is the only objective, and most won't. The author's debut adventure.

title: Eternal Fate in the Penthouse
desc: The faint aroma of cinnamon wafts through a corrupted manor where an agent of seduction, generated with a convenient table, has lured a confidant to the party. Will they rescue their ally, or lose themselves in the deep yellow fog that curls through the sinuous halls?

title: Expanded Dragons
desc: A dragon generator for six types across 1st- to 20th-level power tiers. Each dragon is individually assembled from properties including stats, talents, magic, and treasure rather than pulled from a single fixed template.

title: Expanded Races: Thanians
desc: Forty-one "Thanians," or anthropomorphic, playable Beastfolk. Covers a wide range from canine to dinosaur and beyond, each with distinct traits and likely societal systems to be used for character creation.

title: Familiar Brews: The Practitioner Class
desc: Brew potent concoctions with the free Practitioner class, and not without help from one of five familiars. There's even a template for creating your own. Cook up something new and bond with your familiar simultaneously.

title: Fey and Druid Essentials
desc: Eight pages of fey and druid content: five fey ancestries, a druid class with six new spells, and three fey monsters. Essentials only; expanded in The Guide to the Fey and Fey Druids.

title: Five Mini-Adventures
desc: Five standalone two-page adventures for 3rd–6th level characters, each set in a distinct location: an ancient horror-filled monolith, a sinking sea-palace prison, an Elephant God cult temple, a pirate cavern, and a leprechaun's fey redoubt.

title: Forest Adventures
desc: A hex-based forest supplement made with the Hawkmoor setting in mind. It details Witchyflow Vale, which can expand any setting or even systems other than Shadowdark. Includes the Oozeling ancestry, the Hermit class, 20 new spells, 15 new creatures, and 25 encounter-populated hexes with separate maps for GMs and players.

title: Gnolls! Gnolls! Gnolls!
desc: A free gnoll supplement detailing ancestry, backgrounds, lore, bestiary, "demonic gnolls" with special attacks, and tables galore.

title: Grimdark Options
desc: A foreboding rules supplement, adding three new classes: Plague Doctor, Witch Hunter, and Chaos Sorcerer. Introduces firearms and explosives alongside rules for the corrupting repercussions of evil magic.

title: Gristle & Vine: The Tomb of ...
desc: "Beware the gargoyles" warns the archivist, just after submitting a proposal to the party. In exchange for razing the remnants of the Lost Ones at a fresh dig site led by Jinjer Potts, there will be wealth beyond imagining in this one-shot.

title: Hawkmoor Geographica
desc: A 48-page geographic gazetteer describing 70 regions of the Great Enchanted Vale in the Hawkmoor campaign setting, each with encounter tables. Provides GMs with detailed terrain and encounters to support sandbox play in the Great Enchanted Vale.

title: Her Sun-Shattered Tears
desc: A Dark Sun-inspired and free 1st-level dungeon excursion originally created for the 2023 Shadowdark RPG Independent Game Jam. As thralls of a twisted Sorcerer-Queen, the players search for an ancient relic upon entering an unearthed temple.

title: Histories of the Planes
desc: A supplement in which other planes mirror the "Home Plane," detailing extraplanar mechanics, traversal, and their connections to magic, space, and time. Includes random plane generation tables.

title: House of the Candle Maker
desc: Is there truth to the whispers that an apparition haunts the halls of the boarded-up mansion of the late Gray B'Moth, candlemaker and enigma? And what secrets might his candles still hold? Where is his fortune hidden within?

title: Into the Halls of Havoc
desc: A tomb for 3rd- to 4th-level characters to explore in which the warrior Havoc was sealed alongside his legendary sword: Ravager. Recovering it means cutting through wave after wave of undead while solving a dungeon-spanning puzzle.

title: Isle of the Bleeding Ghost
desc: A 1st-level dungeon pirate bonanza set deep below an uncharted island in its overflowing cavities. In the search for fabled booty, defeat skeletons, merfolk, sirens, and a spectre of the Pirate Queen. Includes seventeen keyed rooms, contending factions, sophisticated traps, and a hand-drawn map.

title: Isle of the Evil Eye
desc: After a sea-ringed garrison for viperians was stricken by a conniving devil, its former leader Sesnu has been remade in the form of a serpent. He loyally slithers along the halls, guarding riches and his master in this 1st- to 4th-level adventure.

title: Kaldera of the Sickle-Dancer
desc: A 3rd-level dungeon wound through the volcanic caldera lair of a warrior-dancer transformed into a marilith through dark sorcery. Twenty-one chambers of deadly encounters fill the winding passages below. Includes new monsters like the cannibal colossus, and magic items including the "corset of the marilith."

title: Kazad Mor: The Cursed Dwarfhome
desc: A 1st-level dungeon set in the cursed halls of Kazad Mor, a cursed dwarven stronghold. Over 40 rooms of hazards, 21 new monsters, and plunder await parties willing to plumb its depths. Includes high-res maps.

title: Keep of the Colorless Crown
desc: Lady Galanos, framed for treason by her own brother, spent millennia in isolation until nothing remained of her but loathing for those who took her keep. Their petrified remains, devoid of any color, indicate that the lady's prolonged life force is as pallid as the sparse and leafless trees outside. Treasures await those who can tread where others don't dare.

title: Life-Paths: A Wizard's Path
desc: A life-story supplement in which a wizard's past choices and dice rolls have lingering implications for the present: boons (perks) and banes (penalties).

title: Lord of Discord
desc: A 3rd-level hexcrawl in which the party must go to the isle of Skelda to hush a melody. Otherwise, it will lure more unsuspecting souls into the Lord of Discord's unbeatable test to find his successor. Sent by the King's Council to end this annual madness, the party must acquire four songs of the ancient Sea Elves to unlock a warded entryway to the Lord's domain.

title: Lost Caves of the Worm-Witch
desc: A 3rd-level dungeon set in the subterranean labyrinth of an undead bard, featuring bizarre hybrid undead creatures and 34 chambers spanning a scorpion-god temple, kobold idol cult, and dark elf catacombs.

title: Lost Tomb of the Derelict King
desc: Stone doors lead to the trapped chambers of Alkil in which the Derelict King has kept an undying following for centuries. To excavate its mountainside treasures, a party of four to six explorers must stay nimble: collapsing debris and a single wrong step threaten equally. A 2nd- to 3rd-level dungeon.

title: Marrow
desc: A retro-future descent into the undersea kingdom of Unlantis where a dormant wreck of a bio-machine notably contains untapped "marrow" fluid. The party, preferably four to six 3rd-level characters, must extract as much as possible before the "Vengeance" stirs back to life. Based on "Vengeance in Her Bones" by Malcolm Jameson.

title: Mice of Legend
desc: A highly-praised and unique saga of heroic mouse-people rewritten for Shadowdark. Includes an expansive campaign guide, three uncondensed adventures, over 25 full-color VTT-ready maps, loads of spells, mounts, and hawk taming. (Reese here, creator of Torchfinder. My wife - who has thus far turned down my requests to play Shadowdark - saw Mice of Legend while I was inputting it. She instantly changed her mind. How's that for a description?)

title: Midasaur
desc: An adventure set in a convoluted structure said to hold impossible wealth. The creature hoarding it is no ordinary beast: Midasaur the Mighty was once an adventurer whose path to sorcerer-king laid bare the perils of unchecked greed. What party could ignore the allure of such a fable?

title: More Goblins!
desc: A supplement greatly expanding your goblin rolodex with variants described in the field notes of Meister Sunseri. Beware of the Goblin King Clan's taxation. And Flesh Sculptors, of course.

title: Mudbones
desc: Danger awaits in the multi-level, mud-buried temple of a dead god stirring to life anew. Filled with traps, secret doors, water features, and new monsters including the "mudbones."

title: Off the Chain: The Sk8r Boi Class
desc: A free Sk8r Boi class. Bring sidewalk-surfing to the dungeon, using speed and acrobatic tricks to kickflip over the darkness below.

title: One With Nature: The Druid Class
desc: A free druid class. The Druid explores the natural world and channels its power in combat, including the ability to wild-shape into animal forms.

title: Outcast Unseelie and the Ooze Between
desc: A highly-interconnected and two-level puzzle dungeon defined by mysterious slime and fey attitude. Includes fairy trinkets, ooze-themed monsters, and several enigmatic NPCs.

title: Petra Serpentis
desc: A 1st- to 3rd-level adventure set in a goblin mine near the village of Tilroc. The goblins were after flarestone, a semi-magical ore that can be refined into a fireproof light source. Something else has since moved in. The village is blaming the goblins for missing livestock; they have the wrong culprit.

title: Plague Jewels of Sekhmet
desc: A 0-level funnel starting in the ruins of a cenotaph dedicated to the Egyptian goddess Sekhmet. Plague-inflicted characters awaken within the tomb with no memories, and must fight through twelve lethal chambers to reach the surface. Includes head-to-head tournament rules and a printable certificate for winners.

title: Pleasures of the Dream Palace
desc: A factional powerkeg for 3rd- to 5th-level characters to ignite within the Glassform Palace... that may just break the fourth wall. Features otherworldly intrigue wherein sinister demonic entanglements, a family in turmoil, and a "superstructure built entirely of thought" push forward an open-ended narrative that rewards strategic decision-making.

title: Prismatic Pudding
desc: A single-monster supplement introducing the Prismatic Pudding: an ooze that drains color from the beings and world around it, then discharges the absorbed energy as mesmerizing beams. Includes a d8 "Prismatic Expulsion" table with distinct chromatic effects.

title: Raven's Ransom: Hordes and Command
desc: This tribute to mass chaos mechanically streamlines mob violence, organized armies, and monster swarms with rules that slot alongside existing combat rules, not replacing them. Includes custom unit-building methods and 12 new monster stat blocks from 3rd- to 17th-level.

title: Reaping at Beltine
desc: A 3rd-level dungeon crawl in the town of Beltine, where on the anniversary of a family's slaying, they've returned from death as horrid puppets. The town's survival is up to the players, whose choice between action and inaction in the ensuing days can have lasting consequences.

title: RESERVOIR
desc: A "body horror puzzle dungeon." What do you know? Why, there's a huge mass of sentient meat bursting within the serpentine sewers below The Great City. Features 25+ keyed locations, colorful (and disgusting) illustrations, and environs that morph over time.

title: Righteous Vow Volume 4: Black Masts & Magic
desc: The fourth volume of a five-adventure hexcrawl sea-farring pirate campaign. Features new rules for ships and their crews, and numerous classes, spells, magic items, and creatures.

title: Rock & Roar!
desc: A neon and thunder bestiary of 50+ monsters inspired from classic rock, pop, and metal song titles and band names. Each monster gets its own illustrated page with backstory, stats, and option charts. Appendices include thematic maps, magic items, mini-adventures, and other stuff.

title: Roustabout
desc: A class supplement featuring the most average of the average of classes: an abysmally mediocre caricature of peasantry who should've stayed in bed. With the Roustabout, even you can play a character whose martial prowess and wit make trimming shrubbery a life-or-death situation.

links.title: Shadowdarklings (class included in the official character builder)

title: Ruins of the Immortal Warlord
desc: A brief 3rd-level dungeon crawl in a collapsed island lich lair designed for minimal-prep play. The location's eleven chambers may hold the answers to a perplexing puzzle box. Three custom enemies, gunpowder-based weapons, and two magic items. Supplements an existing campaign or runs as a one-shot.

title: Seasons in Shadow
desc: Expanded and optional downtime rules for advancement through means other than carousing. Players fund settlement construction from dungeon wealth. This may, however, draw unwanted attention.

title: Shadowdark RPG
desc: The complete Shadowdark RPG core rules: a dark fantasy dungeon crawling game with a lean d20 system and real-time torch tracking that keeps sessions fast and tense. The 326-page book covers four base classes, a bestiary, and introductory adventures. Winner of the 2024 Three Castles Award and four gold ENNIEs including Product of the Year.

title: Shadowdark RPG Quickstart Set
desc: A free two-booklet introduction to Shadowdark RPG: a 68-page Player's Guide with the core rules and eight premade 1st-level characters, and a 68-page GM's Guide with encounter tools and a ready-to-run dungeon adventure. Adventures suitable for characters of 1st through 3rd level. Everything you need to start playing.

title: Shadowdark RPG: Core Spell Cards
desc: A deck of spell cards covering all 88 spells from the Shadowdark RPG core rules, one card per spell for easy reference at the table.

title: Shadowdark RPG: Expansion Spell Cards
desc: A deck of cards covering all 101 spells from Cursed Scroll zines 1-6, one card per spell for easy reference at the table.

title: Shadowdark RPG: Game Master's Guide to the Western Reaches
desc: Game Master's Guide to the Western Reaches, a digest-sized companion to the Shadowdark RPG core rules. Forming a massive campaign setting alongside the Player's Guide, they combine and expand all content from Cursed Scroll zines 1-6. It includes all hexcrawling keys from those zines, and features a full map of the Western Reaches, 16 regions (10 new), over 250 keyed locations, the monsters from Cursed Scrolls 1-6 and new ones, talent-learning mechanics from NPCs, sandbox options and advice, and a new kickoff adventure.

title: Shadowdark RPG: Player's Guide to the Western Reaches
desc: Player's Guide to the Western Reaches, a digest-sized companion to the Shadowdark RPG core rules. Forming a massive campaign setting alongside the Game Master's Guide, they combine and expand all content from Cursed Scroll zines 1-6. The Player's Guide has all character options from those zines, and includes 18 classes, 8 ancestries (with the new half-elf and kobold), complete gear lists, all class spells listed by tier, lore for the nine major gods, new backgrounds and secrets tables, adventuring factions, and Reaches gossip.

title: Shadowdome Thunderdark Zine: Community Sourced Adventure for Gary Con XVI
desc: A community-sourced megadungeon generator created for the 2024 Gary Con XVI, featuring 11 new monsters, 50 dungeon rooms, NPC tables, and danger roll tables with over 1,700 possible results each.

title: Shapeshifter Class
desc: A class focused on mastering animal forms through study and attunement. The Shapeshifter bonds with animals over time, gaining the ability to communicate with them and transform into their natural and magical forms.

title: Shrine of the Jaguar Princess
desc: A 4th-level dungeon set within the ziggurat of an ancient jungle princess. Twenty-six trap-filled chambers of puzzles and ambushes guard a golden idol and stranger secrets beyond... including, but not limited to, a lycanthropy totem and a sacramental body-piercing kit. Silver ENNIE Award winner in 2023 for "Best Free RPG Product".

title: Silver Paths in the Night Garden
desc: A lunar slug god rains eternal night upon a town after a confidant burns compromising personal effects of its celebrated, recently-fallen druid. Will the party overcome silver slime in the blighted wood and save the metamorphosing townsfolk?

title: Smoke and Steel
desc: A supplement pulling players into the 19th and early 20th centuries, but with aliens on the frontier, gunpowder sorcery, and large-scale conflict of the supernatural variety. Includes new classes, weapons, and gear purpose-built for Industrial Age campaigns.

title: SoloDark: Solo Rules for Shadowdark RPG
desc: The official solo rules for Shadowdark RPG: a 12 pages of details describing an oracle system, random prompt tables, dungeon name generator, and alternate mechanics for GMless solo play. The ebook by itself is free.

title: Soulblight - A Shadowdark Setting
desc: The first-ever major third-party campaign setting for Shadowdark, set in the kingdom of Lothorian as it succumbs to the Soulblight: a spreading corruption unleashed by the awakened Sovereigns. Covers all seven regions with maps, two new classes, over 100 monsters, and optional survival and corruption rules.

title: Soulblight - Blades, Guts & Gold
desc: The second Soulblight supplement, focused on henchmen who follow adventurers into dangers far and wide in exchange for loot. Offers 14 classes for henchmen across combat, support, and utility, alongside mechanics for follower loyalty and generation or customization via tables.

title: Soulblight - Champions of Lothorian
desc: The first supplement for the Soulblight setting, adding six classes suited to Lothorian's grim world: Bard, Dreamwalker, Pyromancer, Reaver, Starspeaker, and Templar. Includes new threats, gear, over 50 new spells, two new magical disciplines, and shrine mechanics for Lothorian's gods.

title: Soulblight - Forever Hold Your Peace
desc: A 3rd-to-5th level adventure set in the temple of the Sandreaver, goddess of the Scorpionfolk. The party infiltrates the sacred hall during a wedding between the Worm-King and Reaving Goddess, contending with over 20 rooms of blood rituals, accursed jewels, and the uninviting attendants.

title: Soulblight - Hamartia
desc: A 292-page Soulblight expansion set on the Mediterranean-inspired Islands of Hamartis, where players are delivered to a penal colony by royal decree. Echoes of the Reconquista pervade the multiple paths forward — escape, rebellion, or piracy — playing out across a hexcrawl and dungeon of over 50 rooms, black powder weaponry, and over 100 new monsters.

title: Soulblight - Swords and Sorceries
desc: A grand anthology of adventures indulging the breadth of the Soulblight campaign setting, taking parties across Lothorian's varied environments, from jungle temples and desert ruins to planar expeditions and underworld oddities across the seven realms. Nerve-racking escape sequences, necromancy, and wereleopards included.

title: Soulblight - The Dying Vale
desc: An 82-page Soulblight hex and dungeon crawl set in a region of Lothorian already lost to the chasmborne Sovereigns' corruption, populated by scattered survivors who must now escape. Includes the Old Hero's Tomb dungeon, over 90 new monsters, and mechanics for tracking the blight's advance under the descending dark eye sun.

title: Soulblight - The First Cycle
desc: A 240-page Soulblight expansion set in the prehistoric Nameless Valleys, long before the sprawling kingdoms of Lothorian took shape. Covers an early bronze-age world of tribal peoples in a hexcrawl format, including the Amber Hold dungeon, over 100 new monsters, period-appropriate gear, and rules for overland travel and magical rites. Watch out for giants and beasts from the stars.

title: Soulblight - The Indigo Outpost Feuilleton
desc: A seven-issue broadsheet zine expanding each of Lothorian's regions, from the Lothor Desert to the Blue Glades. Each issue adds regional lore, monster ecologies, bounty targets, new items, and locations for Soulblight campaigns.

title: Soulblight - Vagrants and Vagabonds
desc: The third Soulblight supplement, adding eight classes reflecting Lothorian's harsh social realities: Alchemist, Bandit, Beggar, Blight Doctor, Gladiator, Graverobber, Mauler, and Vestal of Fire. Includes expanded gear, rival NPC adventurers, and optional rules for madness and serious wounds.

title: Sunfall over Swept Sands
desc: An isolated town offers reprieve from the gargoyles swooping over the shifting sands of this compact hexcrawl. At least, it did until the bridge to it collapsed. Can the party help the stranded merchants and travellers? There are fourteen points of interest to captivate players, along with hand-illustrated maps specifically for them and the GM.

title: Temple of The Feathered Serpent
desc: Stylized and inspired by Mesoamerica and its vibrant frescos, this adventure features a ziggurat that grinds out of the sands upon an astronomical conjunction that only occurs once per 55 years. The party must deal with competing treasure hunters and the Black Jaguar that lurks within the trapped interior if they want to recover the Double Chalice, a relic for reversing death. Well, if the undead manifestation of Quetzalcoatl lets them.

title: Temple of the Green Devil
desc: A competitive and deadly tournament module in which adventurers plunder a jungle temple during a solar eclipse, each group sabotaging the other with summoned monsters, traps, and curses. Available in a free edition (with 80s nostalgia) and a paid deluxe edition. Includes 14 new monsters, optional single-team rules, a winner's certificate, and six play-ready characters.

title: The Awful AMBER DOOM
desc: An ode to the old school in which the City Beneath the Sea upraises out of its oceanic entombment during a once-in-a-century lunar solstice. 3rd-level adventurers must race along coral-enshrouded mazes of driftwood, crawling with homunculytes and other fiends, to stop the Corpse-Master before he augments his power by an order of magnitude. Includes the whip-wielding Explorer class.

title: The Beast: Werewolf Class
desc: A half-feral class built around primal instincts and escalating physical power. The Beast class can unlock full werewolf transformation, bringing savage ferocity to combat and unique exploration opportunities.

title: The Black Ballad
desc: An afterlife campaign set in the realm of the Sunless Crossing, made for characters who have fallen in previous adventures. This edition redesigned for Shadowdark expands the system into epic-level play, and includes 17 new monsters.

title: The Brigands of Bristleback Burrow!
desc: A dungeon crawl for 1st- to 3rd-level characters across a secret-riddled temple, a goblin-occupied burrow reclaimed from a warlord, and mines with undead squatters. Includes new monsters and treasures.

title: The Chimera's Gift
desc: Minds surrendered to the sweltering humidity of an island jungle, a cult of naturalists seal themselves within a temple, honing their ingenuity in a shared fever dream. 2nd- to 3rd-level characters breach the structure, discovering the products of prolonged, unmitigated derangement. There are treasures to come away with, including a new magic item, but only if the party can maintain their own sanity through this 31-room dungeon accompanied by seven precision-engineered monsters.

title: The Cold Red
desc: Extreme weather in adventure setting form, with rules for the cold, the heat, and the accumulating stress that goes along with it. "Imagine the Australian outback but with blizzards, droughts and dragons." Features unique equipment, backgrounds, and monsters. The party can (and should) explore camp talents and stress-reduction activities during rest.

title: The Coming of the Unnamable Trinity
desc: As the sky suddenly blackens, three baleful entities unleash a Mephistophelian horde at a rate determined by a "Conquest Roll mechanic" in either Viconis or a city of your choice. While this adventure can be dropped into any campaign, it's uniquely suited to campaign openers and one-shots, providing guidance for any of these scenarios. The only required material is the free 'Shadowdark RPG Quickstart Set.'

title: The Curse of Stoneshatter Tomb
desc: A second-level adventure designed for one-shots and conventions. Characters descend into a long-sealed dwarven mountain tomb and face the curse that has festered within it.

title: The Dark Contracts
desc: Twisted Arthurian myth cross-pollinated with dungeon diving: the fantastical sword shattered, Merlin reduced to a brain in a vat, and whatever consequences the king has left for 1st- to 2nd-level characters to deal with.

title: The Devil is in The Details
desc: In this one-shot, the members of the party hail from one or more family farms in Boreton. Furthermore, they shall each roleplay as the uniquely mediocre Roustabout class created by Michael Putlack (Night Noon Games) and Kelsey Dionne (The Arcane Library). The party must defend their land against the consequences of a deal with a devil: a magical varmint that might just unravel the secrets held by local farmers.

title: The Diabolical Lair of Professor Memnon
desc: After one man segues from the aristocratic high life to evil experimentation in a secluded 16-room hideaway, weird goings-on in a nearby town put the party on his trail. 1st- to 3rd-level characters must defeat the pulp-incarnate Professor Memnon and his henchmen (stat blocks included). Provides tables for generating a custom "Supervillain Sanctuary." Includes VTT-amenable tokens and a map.

title: The Embrace of Cinder's End
desc: "Tentacles in my Shadowdark? It's more likely than you think." As the inexhaustible tentacles burst through the brickwork of this eight-page adventure, players may explore the lore of Susurrus with a new class and lineage. Can they survive the fear-inducing three-floor dungeon where it all happens, let alone stop the Embrace?

title: The Great Boar Hunt
desc: Each player rolls four hapless commoners and pitches them into a crumbling keep. The rooms hold danger and historical fragments of what instigated ruin. Survivors exit at first level; the rest... don't.

title: The Guide to the Fey and Fey Druids
desc: The full 23-page expansion of the more limited Fey and Druid Essentials: supplementing eight fey ancestries, a fey druid class with eighteen spells, eight fey monsters and related encounters.

title: The Hammermancer
desc: Blood for steel: the Hammermancer spends hit points to call special hammer artifacts into existence, all in six pages.

title: The Hand of Ca'Lutra
desc: When the empress Ca'Lutra comes to town, her left hand flings hordes of undead upon its denizens with the utmost disregard for their emotional well-being. Will the adventurers, who just so happened to be strolling by during this calamity, save the day?

title: The Hunt for Lady Viscas' Delight
desc: When a vampiress sets a captive upon the grounds of her estate to be hunted just like the foxes she once poached, the party too is met with her loyal undead, caterwauling wolves, and random encounters. Can the captive escape and brave the elements of the mountain range beyond before sunrise, winning a chance at freedom? The party, treated all the same in this twisted game, will dispatch unique foes and come across interesting magic items in this pulp-laden adventure. What will they make of Lady Visca's Mirror?

title: The King: Shadowdark RPG Class
desc: A Conan-inspired martial class. The King leads allies through danger, accumulates power through bold deeds rather than careful planning, and builds a living legend through conquest and adventure.

title: The Last Waltz
desc: The party's patron tells of a wraith spinning and swaying along the unlit halls of an icicle-bearded manor enveloped in a shroud of deciduous growth. But the grand ball has yet to come to pass. How will the wraith take the characters' attempt to abscond with the riches piled there for just such an event in this 0th-level gauntlet?

title: The League of Dark Few
desc: A city-based mini-setting zine series centered around a secretive organization called the League of Dark Few, made up of string-pullers brokering influence. Includes a guidebook with contract generator, a zero-level gauntlet in dungeons underneath the Vulgar Manse, and a first-level adventure in the Crypt of the Forgotten Duke.

title: The Lostwood Forest
desc: A hexcrawl for 1st- to 3rd-level adventurers set within the accursed Lostwood Forest, where sleeping steals memories and there is no linear path out. The former people who lingered too long under the forest's influence have succumbed to crazed aggression.

title: The Mad Goddess
desc: Multiplying Grublids and manipulative Cubi, venturing further and further from the rekindled halls of a reawakened goddess' cobwebbed keep, have increasingly distressed the locals. Can a party of four 2nd- to 3rd-level characters take on these foes within their snake-filled halls, stopping Goddess Sensa's hunger for domination?

title: The Mini Mushroom Menace
desc: Eight concise pages illustrating a grand face-off with fungal threats ranging from "fungibolds" to rats with toadstools growing out of them. Finale involves a confrontation with their summoner: the sadistic Sporecerer.

title: The Nightmare at Castle Goldgloom
desc: Avoid being consumed by dream demons in this 0-level accursed castle gauntlet. A group of hapless villagers find their way into Castle Goldgloom, enduring lingering nightmares to make it back out alive... ideally with treasure.

title: The Nightmare City of Dr. Satan
desc: During rest, a party of 4th- to 6th-level characters are teleported to the realm of Dr. Satan. In liminal Legba, a mazelike prison city, they must confront the fruits of unnatural experiments. Will they dispatch their abductor and his minions, returning to their former realm with loot in hand?

title: The Pits of Brund
desc: A 70-page megadungeon spanning levels one through six. A recently rediscovered cave network cascades deep underfoot. Includes a milk-white tower in the Badlands, humanoids with the visages of fish, a black mage intent on corruption of a divine artifact, and much more.

title: The Secret of Whitecloak Tower
desc: A 1st-level adventure packed with suggestions and nudges suited to new GMs. A bounty job sets the stage for "sleeping dragons and wizard towers," slottable into any campaign. Includes a printable world map, ledger, and wanted poster.

title: The Spear of Horrendous Iron
desc: A dense regional adventure involving fervently-religious anarchists. Smorgasbords a faction-laden town of shifting alliances with a regional map and dungeon tied together by deliberately unbalanced encounters. Features 14 new monsters and six new magical items.

title: The Spider Queen Rises
desc: In this 3rd-level adventure, drow priestess Narsalee has gone to ground in a temple concealed in the Sablewood outskirts after losing her Shadowdark sanctuary. Her spider thralls have spread throughout the forest, their hanging fibers making passage through the forest impossible. The local alderman needs the trails cleared in time for the impending harvest festival.

title: The Swine of Aeaea
desc: Will the village of Poe's Lantern be swallowed by the Aeaean Swamp encircling it? With around ten chambers in this dungeon adventure, characters at a minimum of 3rd-level will be tested by a reemerging demi-god. Could her witchy ways have something to do with the missing sailors, so the rumors say?

title: The Swine of Aeaea
desc: When newlyweds on a honeymoon retreat on the island of Aeaea disappear, its past unravels for the proprietor in charge. To keep the reputation of his business intact, he's hired the party to lead the search in this single-session pointcrawl. Designed for existing campaigns and one-shots. The five-chamber dungeon, found through querying several inhabitants of the isle, will clue the characters in on the alchemist who once polymorphed her company into boars for the mildest of transgressions. They could come away with up to two interesting items.

title: The Tomb of the Hunters
desc: A five-room dungeon (and part of the six-part Pits of Brund megadungeon) created for the Baron de Ropp's Shadowdark Independent Game Jam. Features hair-raising monster encounters, unique hazards and afflictions, and layered exploration in an action-packed tomb.

title: The Tragic Curse of GRIMHILL FORT
desc: Something cursed Grimhill Fort, and the place has not been right since. A 1st-level dungeon with varied opposition and enough buried history to reward those who can avoid burial there themselves.

title: The Unbroken City
desc: Over the past seventy-two hours, the Red Dragon Malthrax and her brood have taken Feligar. Can the players lead the citizenry to retake their city? Includes a roster of named heroes and villains of contrasting goals and character, alongside six adventure hooks, randomization tables, and 15 monster stat blocks.

title: The Undying Maiden - Expanded Edition
desc: A multi-floor dungeon adventure set in the Towerfall ruins. Jam-packed with new gear and adaptive loot, magic items, and two new classes for any level. Will the party succumb to one of a hundred horrible deaths as provided in a special table (like the others who have set foot in the accursed fort)? Can they end the suffering of the Undying Maiden who haunts the grounds? Includes two new monsters and variations of the established bestiary, four new spells, and a background table. This expanded edition refines the free adventure of the same name, augmenting its depth and breadth from eight to sixteen pages.

title: The Undying Maiden - Free Edition
desc: A multi-floor dungeon adventure set in the Towerfall ruins. Can the party end the suffering of the Undying Maiden who haunts its grounds, doomed to die horribly once a month? Includes a new monster, treasure, and a color-coded map. This free edition is eight pages. The paid expansion of the same name refines it to sixteen, augmenting the depth and breadth with additional features.

title: The Weald of the Whispering Water
desc: Will the party emerge from the fog of a mosquito-infested swamp ravaged by a dwarven mining crew? Three to four 3rd- to 4th-level characters would do well to watch for snakes and avoid tripping over a mud-slathered stone, to say nothing of minding their torches. What awaits them are disembodied murmurs and other inexplicable sounds and sensations creeping in the periphery.

title: The Witch, the Shepherd, His Goats, and Their Daughter
desc: A fairy tale point-crawl for 0th- to 10th-level characters, adjustable by difficulty tier. The shepherd's daughter and goats have been taken by the Witch of the Woods. Twelve forest encounter sites full of "strange, fearsome, and fey monsters" stand between the party and their return, should they best the witch. Ranges from one to three sessions.

title: Three's a Crowd
desc: Activation of the relic at the heart of this adventure means that either 1) the GM did not telegraph its destructive potential sufficiently, or 2) at least one of the players is a complete psychopath and needs to leave. Perhaps both. Regardless, bringing Persephone home without making all living beings in a 1d12-mile radius succeed a very difficult CON check is ideal. Lord Brygsworth is distraught over his missing adopted daughter, after all. You wouldn't disappoint him, would you?

title: Tomb of the Dusk Queen
desc: A compact 1st-level dungeon with fourteen rooms spread across the tomb of the Dusk Queen. Includes cards for rumors and treasure. Short enough for a single session, and well-suited to introducing players to Shadowdark.

title: Tower of Rime Light
desc: A 32-page arctic hexcrawl set in the frozen wastes of Imjaroth. Introduces two new classes, a new psychic ancestry, an undead dragon, and the time-shifting Accursed.

title: Two Strong Arms: The Barbarian Class
desc: A free Barbarian class. A mighty martial class built around raw physical power and ferocity.

title: Under The Inn
desc: An isolated inn of ill-repute harbors secrets even worse than rumors would suggest. From interconnected tunnels below, worshippers of the abyssal demon king Dagon prey upon the patrons within, dragging them through the cellar and to a subterranean lake. Offers three different hooks to account for varying party circumstances.

title: Under the Shadow of Helfast Spire
desc: A 64-page zine featuring the Coal Catacombs, a dungeon setting inspired by historical coal mining conditions. Introduces 4 new classes, 16 new monsters, 30 new magic items, hexcrawl wilderness sites, and rules for hazardous gases and uniquely adapted creatures.

title: Unnatural Selection
desc: A 160-page supplement with masterful art expanding character options with over 70 spells, new ancestries, backgrounds, classes and carousing opportunities. Over 65 new monsters, rules for new elements, various magic items, and 24 zero-level characters to accompany a zero-level gauntlet adventure and three one-shot adventures.

title: Vengeance from the Sunken City
desc: Jewels and the inner workings of "volcano-mechanical" steamworks await those who might venture to the part-submerged city-state of Lanteii to find the Queen's daughter. It hasn't been quite the same since an eruption devastated the enslaved population, replacing sorcerer-king Malachar's relentless and unfeeling reign of antipathy with misleading silence.

title: Voyage Aboard the Flying Leopard
desc: A murder mystery on a ship stocked with forbidden freight. If the peculiar souls aboard didn't confuse matters enough, the situation at sea fluctuates day by day, complicating the party's investigation. And just when they think they've got everything figured out, another headache will arise. If they make it off the ship alive, there are one of two new magic items that could be theirs. That is, if they can even carry one in particular. Includes respective GM and player maps.

title: War in the Dark
desc: Six pages of mass combat: a downtime activity for building and maintaining armies, a streamlined resolution system for battles, and generation tables for battlefields and ancestry-specific unit types.

title: Weird West: The Alien Hideaway
desc: A 3rd-level Wild West adventure into the isometric den of an alien-worshipping cult, featuring a legendary pistol to try out in the included gun duel minigame. With thematically illustrated pages, numerous NPCs quirky as can be, and frontier-flavored gear, this is a dungeon crawl that will surely please GMs and players alike with its time-bending personality.

title: Wildling Class
desc: A complete 10-level class emphasizing beast allies ranging from giant dung beetles to terrorbirds and basilisks. Companionship and personalities evolve in accordance with chosen talents. Introduces custom downtime rules alongside the companion system, including armor-crafting from monster remains, new gear, and class titles.

title: Woeful Barrows And Other Places
desc: An adventure anthology featuring various locales for levels 1–5, including over fifteen wilderness and six urban encounters featuring grifters, cave trolls, and wine. Will you peer into a magical reflecting pool? Would you open Shune's Door? Should the tomb of an ancient elf-lord be pilfered for its riches? Can you rescue Lord Oster's fiancée from her captors? The answers to these questions will challenge and thrill the party.

title: Wretchedwood
desc: A 3rd- to 5th-level excursion through a regional blight that must be contained lest its supernatural source corrupt the entire world.
